cards.name: Strike
cards.description: Deal damage.

cards.name: Multi-Hit
cards.description: Hit 3 times.

cards.name: Heavy Strike
cards.description: High damage. Costs 2 AP.

cards.name: Piercing
cards.description: Ignores enemy block.

cards.name: Reckless
cards.description: High damage, self-damage.

cards.name: Execute
cards.description: Bonus damage below 30% HP.
cards.notes: Shows +0 when condition not met — confusing

cards.name: Lifetap
cards.description: Deal damage. Heal 20% of damage dealt.

cards.name: Block
cards.description: Gain block.

cards.name: Thorns
cards.description: Gain 6 block and reflect 3 damage when hit.

cards.name: Emergency
cards.description: Gain block. Double if HP below 30%.

cards.name: Fortify
cards.description: Gain 7 persistent block into next turn.

cards.name: Brace
cards.description: Block equal to enemy telegraph.

cards.name: Overheal
cards.description: Gain 10 block. Double if HP below 50%.
cards.notes: Shows ×2 (0) when condition not met — confusing

cards.name: Parry
cards.description: Block + draw if enemy attacks.

cards.name: Empower
cards.description: Next card deals 50% more damage.

cards.name: Quicken
cards.description: Gain +1 AP this turn.

cards.name: Focus
cards.description: Next card costs 1 less AP.

cards.name: Double Strike
cards.description: Next attack card hits twice at full power.
cards.notes: Purple border despite BUFF type — should be gold

cards.name: Weaken
cards.description: Apply weakness.

cards.name: Expose
cards.description: Apply vulnerable.

cards.name: Hex
cards.description: Apply poison 3 for 3 turns.

cards.name: Slow
cards.description: Skip enemy's next defend or buff.
cards.notes: Card text broader than mechanic — says 'next action' but only skips defend/buff

cards.name: Cleanse
cards.description: Remove all debuffs. Draw 1 card.

cards.name: Scout
cards.description: Draw 2 cards.
cards.notes: Fixed: HAND_SIZE cap removed for mid-turn draws

cards.name: Recycle
cards.description: Draw 3 cards.
cards.notes: Fixed: HAND_SIZE cap removed for mid-turn draws

cards.name: Foresight
cards.description: Draw 2 cards.
cards.notes: Same effect text as scout — no differentiation

cards.name: Conjure
cards.description: Summon one of three cards to your hand this encounter.

cards.name: Forge
cards.description: Upgrade a card in your hand for this encounter.

cards.name: Transmute
cards.description: Transform your weakest hand card into a different type.

cards.name: Immunity
cards.description: Absorb next damage instance (up to 8).

cards.name: Mirror
cards.description: Copy previous card effect.

cards.name: Adapt
cards.description: Smart: Block vs ATK, Cleanse vs debuff, else Attack.
cards.notes: Effect text diverges from mechanics.ts description

cards.name: Overclock
cards.description: Next card 2x effect.

cards.name: Power Strike
cards.description: A heavier strike that deals more damage.

cards.name: Twin Strike
cards.description: Hit twice. Each hit triggers Burn and Bleed separately.

cards.name: Iron Wave
cards.description: Deal damage and gain block.

cards.name: Reinforce
cards.description: Gain more block than a basic shield.

cards.name: Shrug It Off
cards.description: Gain block and draw a card on Quick Play or Charge.

cards.name: Bash
cards.description: Deal damage and apply Vulnerable.

cards.name: Guard
cards.description: Gain a large amount of block.

cards.name: Sap
cards.description: Deal damage and apply Weakness.

cards.name: Rupture
cards.description: Deal damage and apply Bleed.

cards.name: Lacerate
cards.description: Deal damage and apply Bleed.

cards.name: Kindle
cards.description: Deal damage, apply Burn, and immediately trigger it.

cards.name: Ignite
cards.description: Your next attack applies Burn.

cards.name: Overcharge
cards.description: Deal damage. On Charge: scales with Charges played this encounter.

cards.name: Riposte
cards.description: Deal damage and gain block.

cards.name: Absorb
cards.description: Gain block. On Charge Correct: also draw a card.

cards.name: Reactive Shield
cards.description: Gain block and apply Thorns for 1 turn.

cards.name: Sift
cards.description: Look at top cards of your draw pile and discard some.

cards.name: Scavenge
cards.description: Put a card from your discard pile on top of your draw pile.

cards.name: Precision Strike
cards.description: CC scales with question difficulty.

cards.name: Stagger
cards.description: Skip the enemy's next action. Turn counter still advances.

cards.name: Corrode
cards.description: Remove enemy block and apply Weakness.

cards.name: Swap
cards.description: Discard a card and draw a replacement.

cards.name: Siphon Strike
cards.description: Deal damage and heal based on overkill damage (min 2, max 10).

cards.name: Aegis Pulse
cards.description: Gain block. On Charge Correct: same-chain cards in hand gain +2 block.

cards.name: Inscription of Fury
cards.description: All attacks deal bonus damage for the rest of combat.

cards.name: Inscription of Iron
cards.description: Gain block at the start of each turn for the rest of combat.

cards.name: Gambit
cards.description: HP swing. QP: deal damage, lose HP. CC: deal damage, heal HP. CW: deal damage, lose more HP.

cards.name: Chain Lightning
cards.description: CC: deal 8 × chain length (counts itself). Requires answering correctly.

cards.name: Volatile Slash
cards.description: CC: 30 dmg then EXHAUST this card. QP/CW: standard damage.

cards.name: Burnout Shield
cards.description: CC: 24 block then EXHAUST this card. QP/CW: standard block.

cards.name: Knowledge Ward
cards.description: Block scales with correct Charges.

cards.name: Warcry
cards.description: QP: +2 Str (this turn). CC: +2 Str (permanent) + next Charge free. CW: +1 Str (this turn).

cards.name: Battle Trance
cards.description: Draw 3. CC: no restriction. QP/CW: cannot play or Charge more cards this turn.

cards.name: Curse of Doubt
cards.description: Enemy takes +30% damage from Charged attacks (2t). CC: +50% (3t). CW: +20% (1t).

cards.name: Mark of Ignorance
cards.description: Enemy takes +3 flat damage from Charged attacks (2t). CC: +5 (3t). CW: +2 (1t).

cards.name: Corroding Touch
cards.description: 0 AP. Apply Weakness. CC: more stacks + Vulnerable. Charge costs standard +1 AP surcharge.

cards.name: Phase Shift
cards.description: QP/CW: CHOOSE 8 dmg OR 8 block. CC: 12 dmg AND 12 block.

cards.name: Chameleon
cards.description: Copy last card at 1.0×. CC: 1.3× + inherit chain type. CW: 0.7×.

cards.name: Dark Knowledge
cards.description: Deal 3 dmg per cursed fact. CC: 5/curse. CW: 1/curse.

cards.name: Chain Anchor
cards.description: Draw 1. CC: set chain to 2 for the next chain card + draw 1. Not a chain link itself.

cards.name: Unstable Flux
cards.description: QP/CW: random effect (dmg/block/draw/debuff) at 1.0×/0.7×. CC: CHOOSE at 1.5×.

cards.name: Smite
cards.description: CC scales with Knowledge Aura.

cards.name: Feedback Loop
cards.description: Flow State bonus. CW: 0 dmg + Aura crash.

cards.name: Recall
cards.description: CC on Review Queue fact: bonus dmg + heal.

cards.name: Hemorrhage
cards.description: QP: 4+(4×Bleed) dmg, consume all Bleed. CC: 4+(6×Bleed). CW: 4+(2×Bleed).

cards.name: Eruption
cards.description: X-cost: consumes all remaining AP. QP: 8 dmg/AP. CC: 12 dmg/AP (surcharge first). CW: 5 dmg/AP.

cards.name: Bulwark
cards.description: QP: 18 block. CC: 36 block then EXHAUST. CW: 10 block.

cards.name: Conversion
cards.description: Convert up to 10 block into damage (1:1). CC: up to 15. CW: up to 5. Block is lost.

cards.name: Ironhide
cards.description: QP: 6 block + 1 Str (this turn). CC: 6 block + 1 Str (permanent). CW: 4 block.

cards.name: Frenzy
cards.description: QP: next 2 cards cost 0 AP. CC: next 3. CW: next 1. Eruption X drain still fires.

cards.name: Mastery Surge
cards.description: QP: +1 mastery to 1 random hand card. CC: 2 cards. CW: fizzle.

cards.name: War Drum
cards.description: QP: all hand cards gain +2 base effect this turn. CC: +4. CW: +1.

cards.name: Entropy
cards.description: QP: 3 Burn + 2 Poison(2t). CC: 6 Burn + 4 Poison(3t). CW: 2 Burn + 1 Poison(1t).

cards.name: Archive
cards.description: QP/CW: retain 1 card in hand at turn end. CC: retain 2 cards.

cards.name: Reflex
cards.description: QP: draw 2. CC: draw 3. CW: draw 1. PASSIVE: when discarded from hand, gain 3 block.

cards.name: Recollect
cards.description: Return 1 exhausted card to discard pile. CC: return 2. Cannot target Inscriptions.

cards.name: Synapse
cards.description: QP/CW: draw 2/1. CC: draw 2 + wildcard chain link (extends active chain by 1).

cards.name: Siphon Knowledge
cards.description: QP: draw 2, see answers 3s. CC: draw 3, 5s. CW: draw 1, 2s.

cards.name: Tutor
cards.description: Search draw pile; choose a card, add to hand. CC: that card costs 0 AP this turn.

cards.name: Sacrifice
cards.description: Lose 5 HP. QP: draw 2 + gain 1 AP. CC: draw 3 + gain 2 AP. CW: draw 1 + gain 1 AP.

cards.name: Catalyst
cards.description: QP/CW: double enemy Poison. CC: double Poison AND Burn. L3 QP: also double Bleed.

cards.name: Mimic
cards.description: QP: random discard at 0.8×. CC: choose discard at 1.0×. CW: random at 0.5×. Copies BASE values.

cards.name: Aftershock
cards.description: QP: repeat last QP card at 0.5×. CC: repeat last CC card at 0.7× (no quiz). CW: last any at 0.3×.

cards.name: Knowledge Bomb
cards.description: QP/CW: 4 dmg flat. CC: 4 × correctChargesThisEncounter dmg (own CC counts).

cards.name: Inscription of Wisdom
cards.description: Exhausts on play. QP: each future CC draws 1 extra. CC: draw 1 extra + heal 1 HP. CW: FIZZLE.

enemies.name: Page Flutter
enemies.notes: Verified in combat-basic scenario — sprite and intent render correctly

enemies.name: The Bookwyrm
enemies.notes: Removed from ACT_ENEMY_POOLS, kept in ENEMY_TEMPLATES for save compat

enemies.name: The Peer Reviewer
enemies.notes: Removed from ACT_ENEMY_POOLS, kept in ENEMY_TEMPLATES for save compat

enemies.name: The Grade Curve
enemies.notes: Unique art generated and deployed — sprite + portrait/landscape backgrounds

relics.name: Whetstone
relics.description: All attacks +3 base damage. All shields -1 block.

relics.name: Iron Shield
relics.description: Start each turn with 3 block. Draw 1 fewer card on turn 1.

relics.name: Vitality Ring
relics.description: +20 max HP this run.

relics.name: Herbal Pouch
relics.description: Heal 8 HP after each combat encounter.

relics.name: Swift Boots
relics.description: Draw 6 cards per turn instead of 5.
relics.notes: Fixed: HAND_SIZE cap removed, first-hand draw corrected

relics.name: Steel Skin
relics.description: Take 3 less damage from all sources (min 1).

relics.name: Gold Magnet
relics.description: +30% gold from all sources.

relics.name: Merchant's Favor
relics.description: Shops offer 1 additional card and 1 additional relic choice.

relics.name: Lucky Coin
relics.description: After 3 wrong Charges in one encounter, gain +50% damage on your next correct Charge.

relics.name: Scavenger's Eye
relics.description: See 4 card choices after combat instead of 3.

relics.name: Last Breath
relics.description: Once per encounter: survive lethal at 1 HP, gain 8 block.

relics.name: Tag Magnet
relics.description: When drawing cards, +30% chance to draw cards sharing a chain type with your last played card.

relics.name: Adrenaline Shard
relics.description: Correct Charged answers in under 3 seconds refund 1 AP (once per turn).

relics.name: Volatile Core
relics.description: All attacks +50% damage. Wrong Charged answers deal 3 damage to you AND the enemy.

relics.name: Aegis Stone
relics.description: Block from shield cards carries between turns (max 15). At 15 block, gain Thorns 2.

relics.name: Regeneration Orb
relics.description: Heal 3 HP at end of each turn where you played 2+ shield cards.

relics.name: Plague Flask
relics.description: All poison ticks deal +2 extra damage. Poison lasts 1 extra turn.

relics.name: Memory Nexus
relics.description: Every 3 correct Charges in an encounter, draw 2 extra cards next turn. Repeats each time threshold is crossed.

relics.name: Insight Prism
relics.description: Wrong Charged answers reveal the correct answer AND next appearance of that fact auto-succeeds.

relics.name: Blood Price
relics.description: +1 AP per turn. Lose 2 HP per turn.

relics.name: Reckless Resolve
relics.description: Below 40% HP, all attacks +50% damage. Above 80% HP, attacks -15% damage.

relics.name: Overflow Gem
relics.description: When you spend 4+ AP in a single turn, the last card played gets +75% effect.

relics.name: Resonance Crystal
relics.description: Each chain link beyond 2 draws +1 card at end of turn.

relics.name: Quick Study
relics.description: After 3+ correct Charges: preview 1 answer. Wrong answers deal +2 self-damage rest of encounter.

relics.name: Thick Skin
relics.description: Immune to the first debuff each encounter. Take +2 damage from all sources.

relics.name: Tattered Notebook
relics.description: +5 gold on your first correct Charge each encounter.

relics.name: Battle Scars
relics.description: After taking a hit, your next attack deals +3 bonus damage (once per turn).

relics.name: Brass Knuckles
relics.description: Every 3rd attack card played deals +6 bonus damage.

relics.name: Pocket Watch
relics.description: Draw 1 extra card on turns 1 and 5 of each encounter.

relics.name: Chain Link Charm
relics.description: Earn +5 gold per chain link in a completed Knowledge Chain.

relics.name: Worn Shield
relics.description: Every shield card grants 1 Thorns (this turn). All block values -20%.

relics.name: Bleedstone
relics.description: Bleed you apply stacks +2 higher. Bleed decays 1 turn slower.

relics.name: Ember Core
relics.description: Burn you apply stacks +2 higher. Enemy with 5+ Burn stacks: +20% attack damage.

relics.name: Gambler's Token
relics.description: Wrong Charged answers grant +3 gold.

relics.name: Thoughtform
relics.description: When ALL cards in a turn are Charged correctly, gain +1 permanent Strength.

relics.name: Scar Tissue
relics.description: Each wrong Charge this run permanently adds +2 flat damage to all future correct Charges.

relics.name: Living Grimoire
relics.description: After combat, if 3+ Charges correct, heal 3 HP.

relics.name: Surge Capacitor
relics.description: On Knowledge Surge turns: +1 AP and draw 2 extra cards.

relics.name: Obsidian Dice
relics.description: Each correct Charge: 60% chance +50% multiplier, 40% chance -25% multiplier.

relics.name: Gladiator's Mark
relics.description: Start each encounter with +1 Strength for 3 turns.

relics.name: Chain Reactor
relics.description: Knowledge Chains of 2+ deal 6 splash damage per chain link.

relics.name: Quicksilver Quill
relics.description: Charged quizzes answered in under 2 seconds get an additional 1.5× multiplier.

relics.name: Time Warp
relics.description: On Knowledge Surge turns, quiz timer is halved but Charge multiplier increases to 5.0× and gain +1 AP.

relics.name: Crit Lens
relics.description: Charged correct answers have 25% chance to DOUBLE the final damage (after all multipliers).

relics.name: Thorn Crown
relics.description: When you have 15+ block at start of turn, reflect 5 damage per enemy attack received.

relics.name: Bastion's Will
relics.description: Charged shield cards gain +75% block. Quick Play shield cards gain +25% block.
relics.notes: Fixed: Quick Play +25% block now in resolver

relics.name: Festering Wound
relics.description: When enemy has 3+ poison stacks, all attacks deal +40% damage.

relics.name: Capacitor
relics.description: Unused AP at end of turn stores as Charge (max 3). Next turn, gain stored Charge as bonus AP.

relics.name: Double Down
relics.description: Once per encounter: Charge same card twice. Both correct: 5× power. One correct: 1.5×. Both wrong: 0.3×.

relics.name: Scholar's Crown
relics.description: +40% damage on Review Queue facts. +10% on all other correct Charges.

relics.name: Domain Mastery Sigil
relics.description: Flow State: +1 AP per turn. Brain Fog: -1 AP per turn.
relics.notes: Fixed: now uses deck-composition check (4+ same-domain cards = +30%)

relics.name: Phoenix Feather
relics.description: Once per run: on death, resurrect at 15% HP. All cards auto-Charge free for 1 turn.
relics.notes: Fixed: auto-Charge-free for 1 turn after resurrection wired via phoenixAutoChargeTurns

relics.name: Scholar's Gambit
relics.description: 5 relic slots → 6. Wrong Charged answers deal 3 damage to you.

relics.name: Prismatic Shard
relics.description: All chain multipliers +0.5×. 5-chains grant +1 AP.

relics.name: Mirror of Knowledge
relics.description: Once per encounter: after correct Charge, replay card at 1.5× (no quiz, no AP).
relics.notes: Fixed: replay at 1.5x wired in turnManager, once per encounter

relics.name: Red Fang
relics.description: First attack each encounter deals +30% damage.

relics.name: Chronometer
relics.description: Quiz timer +3 seconds. All Charge multipliers -15%.

relics.name: Soul Jar
relics.description: Every 5 correct Charges stores 1 charge. Spend a charge to auto-succeed a quiz.

relics.name: Null Shard
relics.description: Chain multipliers are locked at 1.0×. All attacks +25% damage.

relics.name: Hemorrhage Lens
relics.description: Multi-hit attacks apply 1 Bleed per hit (on subsequent hits).

relics.name: Archive Codex
relics.description: After combat: +1 flat damage per 10 total mastery levels across your deck.

relics.name: Berserker's Oath
relics.description: Start run with -30 max HP. All attacks +40% damage.

relics.name: Chain Forge
relics.description: Once per encounter: a card that would break a chain continues it instead, gains current multiplier, and the chain count increments.

relics.name: Deja Vu
relics.description: Turn 1 of each encounter: 1 card from your discard appears in hand with -1 AP cost, carrying a familiar fact. Level 15+: 2 cards.

relics.name: Inferno Crown
relics.description: When the enemy has both Burn and Poison, all your damage +30%.

relics.name: Mind Palace
relics.description: Track correct Charge streak across the run. 1 wrong per 10 freezes instead of resets. At 10/20/30 streak: +3/+6/+10 to all effects.

relics.name: Entropy Engine
relics.description: If you play 3+ different card types in one turn: deal 5 damage and gain 5 block.

relics.name: Bloodstone Pendant
relics.description: Taking damage grants 1 Fury stack. Each Fury = +1 damage on next attack, then consumed.

relics.name: Chromatic Chain
relics.description: Completing a 3+ chain primes the next chain to start at length 2. Carries across turns. Once per encounter.

relics.name: Dragon's Heart
relics.description: Passive: +2 all attacks. Elite kill: +5 max HP + heal 30%. Boss kill: +15 max HP + full heal + random Legendary relic.

relics.name: Omniscience
relics.description: 3 correct Charges in one turn → the 4th auto-succeeds.

relics.name: Paradox Engine
relics.description: Wrong Charges resolve at 0.3× AND deal 5 piercing damage. Gain +1 AP every turn permanently.

relics.name: Akashic Record
relics.description: +50% damage on correct Charges. (Future: bonus also draws 1 card when fact not seen in 3+ encounters.)

relics.name: Singularity
relics.description: Completing a 5-chain deals bonus damage equal to total chain damage dealt (doubles output).

relics.name: Volatile Manuscript
relics.description: All Charge multipliers +0.5×. Every 3rd Charge applies 4 Burn to yourself.

relics.name: Toxic Bloom
relics.description: When an enemy dies from poison, your next attack applies +3 bonus poison.

relics.name: Berserker's Focus
relics.description: Charge surcharge costs 0 AP. Max AP per turn reduced to 2.

relics.name: Glass Lens
relics.description: Charge Correct values +50%. Take 3 damage on Charge Wrong.

relics.name: Pain Conduit
relics.description: When you lose HP: deal that much damage to enemy. Healing is halved.

relics.name: Ritual Blade
relics.description: First card each turn deals double damage. Other cards deal -25%.

relics.name: Hollow Armor
relics.description: Start each encounter with 20 block. Cannot gain new block.

relics.name: Overclocked Mind
relics.description: Draw 2 extra cards per turn. Discard 2 cards at end of turn.

relics.name: Mnemonic Scar
relics.description: Wrong on a previously-correct fact: CC power. Wrong on a new fact: take 5 damage.

relics.name: Knowledge Tax
relics.description: Gain 10 gold per Charge Correct. Charge Correct values -10%.

relics.name: Bloodletter
relics.description: When you take self-damage: next attack +3 damage.

relics.name: Chain Addict
relics.description: Complete a 3+ chain: heal 5 HP.

relics.name: Quiz Master
relics.description: 3+ Charge Corrects in one turn: +2 AP next turn.

relics.name: Exhaustion Engine
relics.description: When a card is exhausted: draw 2 cards.

relics.name: Momentum Wheel
relics.description: Play 4+ cards in a turn: last card +100% effect.

relics.name: Thorn Mantle
relics.description: End turn with 10+ block: deal 4 thorns damage when hit.

relics.name: Combo Ring
relics.description: First Charged correct +1 damage all attacks

relics.name: Echo Chamber
relics.description: 2+ chain replays first card at 60%

relics.name: Echo Lens
relics.description: Echo cards deal full power on wrong Charge

statusEffects.name: poison
statusEffects.description: Damage per turn equal to value

statusEffects.name: regen
statusEffects.description: Heal per turn equal to value

statusEffects.name: burn
statusEffects.description: On-hit amplifier: bonus = stacks, then halves. Self-Burn variant for player.
statusEffects.notes: AR-203. On-hit: bonus = stacks, then halves. Self-Burn variant for player.

statusEffects.name: bleed
statusEffects.description: +1/stack to card-play damage. Decays 1/turn at end of enemy turn.
statusEffects.notes: AR-203. +1/stack to card-play damage. Decays 1/turn at end of enemy turn.

domains.name: General Knowledge
domains.description: Notable records, firsts, inventions, and broad world facts.

domains.name: Natural Sciences
domains.description: Chemistry, physics, Earth science, and scientific principles.

domains.name: Space & Astronomy
domains.description: Planets, stars, missions, and cosmic discoveries.

domains.name: General Geography
domains.description: Regional geography, landforms, climate, and world facts.

domains.name: Capitals & Flags
domains.description: Learn every capital city and flag in the world.

domains.name: History
domains.description: Events, civilizations, timelines, and historical figures.

domains.name: Mythology & Folklore
domains.description: Myths, deities, creatures, and cultural storytelling traditions.

domains.name: Human Body & Health
domains.description: Anatomy, physiology, medicine, and health literacy.

domains.name: Food & World Cuisine
domains.description: Dishes, ingredients, food culture, and culinary science.

domains.name: Art & Architecture
domains.description: Art movements, famous works, styles, and structures.

domains.name: Language
domains.description: Vocabulary, reading, listening, and language acquisition.
domains.notes: AR-230: Full language deck rebuild (2026-03-23). 8 languages from authoritative sources (JLPT/TOPIK/HSK/CEFRLex). Sonnet-verified 6,445 suspicious answers. 800-card audit: 93-97% pass rate. 40,561 language facts total.

specialEvents.name: Relic Forge
specialEvents.description: A forge still hot in the dark. Choose 1 of 3 relic upgrades.

specialEvents.name: Card Transform
specialEvents.description: Something in the air warps cards near your hands. Upgrade one card mechanic.

specialEvents.name: Deck Thin
specialEvents.description: A slot in the wall. Drop up to 2 cards. They won't come back.

specialEvents.name: Knowledge Spring
specialEvents.description: Water trickles through cracked stone. Facts you got right this run hold a day longer.

specialEvents.name: Mystery Event
specialEvents.description: Something unusual stirs in the darkness...

mysteryEffects.name: A faint warmth seeps up through the floor. Restored 20 HP.
50 gold, wedged into a crack in the rock.
Your mind feels sharp. Draw +1 card next encounter.
The Flashcard Merchant
mysteryEffects.description: Choice: buy bundle (25g→upgrade card) or browse free (+10g) or walk away
mysteryEffects.notes: AR-266: Replaced scattered_coins. TODO: add study mechanic for bonus charges

mysteryEffects.name: The Tutor's Office
mysteryEffects.description: Heal 10% HP (simplified — TODO: preview 3 facts with +30% charge bonus)
mysteryEffects.notes: AR-266: Replaced healing_fountain. TODO: add study mechanic

mysteryEffects.name: Strict Librarian
mysteryEffects.description: Remove card + heal OR take damage

mysteryEffects.name: The Wrong Answer Museum
mysteryEffects.description: Gain 15 gold (simplified — TODO: display wrong facts, +1g per studied, reduce wrongCount)
mysteryEffects.notes: AR-266: Replaced knowledge_tax event. TODO: add reviewMuseum mechanic

mysteryEffects.name: The Rival Student
mysteryEffects.notes: AR-266: Replaced gamblers_tome. TODO: add rivalDuel mechanic — 5 MCQs vs 65% rival

mysteryEffects.name: The Burning Library
mysteryEffects.description: Rush in (risk 15 HP for upgrade+card) or watch it burn
mysteryEffects.notes: AR-266: Rethemed with new description. TODO: add escalating quiz mechanic (4 easy questions)

mysteryEffects.name: The Knowledge Gamble
mysteryEffects.description: Random: full heal (correct) or lose 8 max HP (wrong)
mysteryEffects.notes: AR-266: Replaced final_wager. TODO: add hardest-question mechanic (mastery-5, choice on correct)

mysteryEffects.name: The Meditation Chamber
mysteryEffects.description: Choice: upgrade card, rest+heal (15%+20g), or continue onward
mysteryEffects.notes: AR-266: Replaced the_recursion. TODO: add meditation mechanic — accuracy stats + theme -1 distractor

mysteryEffects.name: Desperate Bargain
mysteryEffects.description: Sacrifice max HP to thin deck

ascensionLevels.name: First Trial
ascensionLevels.description: +1 elite per segment. BUFF: Choose 1 of 3 starter relics.

ascensionLevels.name: Aggressive Foes
ascensionLevels.description: Enemies +10% damage. BUFF: +1 AP on first turn of each encounter.

ascensionLevels.name: Scarce Healing
ascensionLevels.description: Rest heals 25% instead of 30%. BUFF: Free card removal at rest.

ascensionLevels.name: Quick Thinking
ascensionLevels.description: Timer -1s on all questions. BUFF: Start with a random uncommon card.

ascensionLevels.name: Lean Start
ascensionLevels.description: Start with 12 cards. BUFF: One free card removal per shop visit.

ascensionLevels.name: No Escape
ascensionLevels.description: Cannot flee encounters. BUFF: Heal 5 HP on 3+ combo.

ascensionLevels.name: Harsh Grading
ascensionLevels.description: Close distractors more common. BUFF: Charged correct +15% damage.

ascensionLevels.name: Elite Surge
ascensionLevels.description: Mini-bosses gain boss-tier attacks. BUFF: Mini-boss victories always drop a relic.

ascensionLevels.name: Undying Foes
ascensionLevels.description: Enemies regenerate 2 HP/turn. BUFF: Start encounters with 3 shield.

ascensionLevels.name: Cursed Start
ascensionLevels.description: Start with a Curse card in deck. BUFF: Choose a 2nd starter relic + 1 free relic reroll per boss.

ascensionLevels.name: Slim Pickings
ascensionLevels.description: Boss relics reduced to 2 choices. BUFF: Relics trigger +50% more.

ascensionLevels.name: Deep Knowledge
ascensionLevels.description: Tier 1 cards use 4-option MCQ. BUFF: Tier 1 charged correct +20% damage.

ascensionLevels.name: Fragile
ascensionLevels.description: Player max HP reduced to 80. BUFF: Start with Vitality Ring (+20 HP, takes slot).

ascensionLevels.name: Combo Breaker
ascensionLevels.description: Combo resets each turn. BUFF: Perfect turns grant +1 AP next turn.

ascensionLevels.name: Boss Rush
ascensionLevels.description: Bosses +25% HP. BUFF: Boss defeat fully heals player.

ascensionLevels.name: No Echo
ascensionLevels.description: Echo mechanic disabled. BUFF: Discarding a card grants 1 shield.

ascensionLevels.name: Scholar's Burden
ascensionLevels.description: Wrong answers deal 3 self-damage. BUFF: Correct answers heal 1 HP.

ascensionLevels.name: Minimalist
ascensionLevels.description: Start with 10 cards. BUFF: Choose starting hand each encounter.

ascensionLevels.name: True Test
ascensionLevels.description: All questions use hard formats. BUFF: Charge plays cost 0 extra AP.

ascensionLevels.name: Heart of the Archive
ascensionLevels.description: Final boss gains second phase. BUFF: Start with 3 relics (choose from 7).

keywords.name: Block
keywords.description: Absorbs incoming damage before HP. Resets at start of your turn.

keywords.name: Poison
keywords.description: Deals damage at the start of each turn. Decreases by 1 each turn.

keywords.name: Weakness
keywords.description: Enemy deals 25% less damage while weakened.

keywords.name: Vulnerable
keywords.description: Target takes 50% more damage while vulnerable.

keywords.name: Thorns
keywords.description: When hit, reflect damage back to the attacker.

keywords.name: Persistent Block
keywords.description: Block that carries over to the next turn instead of resetting.

keywords.name: Lifetap
keywords.description: Heal a percentage of damage dealt to the enemy.

keywords.name: AP
keywords.description: Action Points. Spend AP to play cards. Refreshes each turn.

keywords.name: Echo
keywords.description: A ghostly copy of a card. Fades after use.

keywords.name: Mastery Trial
keywords.description: A special challenge. Answering correctly masters the fact permanently.

keywords.name: Inscription
keywords.description: Played once and persists for the rest of combat. Exhausts on play and is permanently removed from game (cannot be Recollected). Pool = 1 per type — no stacking same-type inscriptions.
keywords.notes: Three types: Fury (damage step 3), Iron (turn start block), Wisdom (CC draw+heal). Card definitions in AR-206/AR-208.

synergies.name: empower
synergies.description: strike, heavy_strike, multi_hit, reckless, piercing, execute, lifetap

synergies.name: double_strike
synergies.description: strike, heavy_strike, multi_hit, reckless, piercing, execute, lifetap, empower

synergies.name: expose
synergies.description: strike, heavy_strike, multi_hit, reckless, piercing, execute

synergies.name: cleanse
synergies.description: Synergizes with: emergency, overheal, fortify, adapt

synergies.name: adapt
synergies.description: Synergizes with: scout, foresight, mirror, cleanse

cardTypes.name: attack
cardTypes.description: Deals damage to enemies; the primary offensive card type.

cardTypes.name: shield
cardTypes.description: Grants block or defensive buffs; the primary defensive card type.

cardTypes.name: utility
cardTypes.description: Manipulates the deck, hand, or turn flow without dealing direct damage.

cardTypes.name: buff
cardTypes.description: Applies positive status effects to the player for sustained advantage.

cardTypes.name: debuff
cardTypes.description: Applies negative status effects to enemies to weaken or control them.

cardTypes.name: wild
cardTypes.description: Hybrid cards that combine effects from multiple types; rare and powerful.
